services.title: Owner Name Change (e-Katha Instant Online Transfer)
services.description: Transfer your BESCOM electricity connection online in just 2-3 steps using your BBMP e-Katha! Log into bescom.co.in, input your Account Number & e-Katha details to auto-fetch owner info, pay fees & eSign documents digitally without visiting any office.

steps.title: Login / Register on bescom.co.in
steps.details: Go to bescom.co.in, log in or create an account, and enter your 10-digit BESCOM Account Number.

steps.title: Select Name Change & Provide e-Katha Details
steps.details: Select 'Name Change Service' and enter your BBMP e-Katha details. The system automatically fetches and verifies current property owner information.

steps.title: Pay Name Change Fee (₹100)
steps.details: Pay the ₹100/- name change processing fee online via UPI, Netbanking, or Debit Card.

steps.title: Digital eSign & Stamp Duty Payment
steps.details: Perform Aadhaar eSign and pay online: ₹603/- for e-Stamp & eSign for Power Supply Agreement, and ₹591/- for e-Stamp & eSign for Indemnity Bond.

steps.title: Completion & Automatic Bill Update
steps.details: Application complete! Your name change is processed digitally, and your updated name will reflect on your bill from the very next billing cycle.

documents.name: BBMP e-Katha Number / Details
documents.note: Used for instant online property owner auto-fetch

documents.name: 10-digit BESCOM Account ID
documents.note: Found on your monthly electricity bill

documents.name: Aadhaar Card (for digital eSign)
documents.note: Mobile number linked with Aadhaar required for OTP eSign

services.title: New LT Electricity Connection (Domestic / Commercial)
services.description: Apply for a new low-tension electricity supply line for a newly constructed residential house, flat, shop, or commercial establishment.

steps.title: Apply Online / Submit Form W
steps.details: Submit Form W online via BESCOM portal or Seva Sindhu with sanctioned building plan and wiring completion certificate.

steps.title: Wiring Inspection by Licensed Electrician
steps.details: Get internal wiring certified by a Class-1 Licensed Electrical Contractor (LEC).

steps.title: Power Sanction & Demand Note
steps.details: BESCOM issues a demand note detailing Initial Security Deposit (ISD) and Service Line Charges.

steps.title: Meter Installation & Service Line Hookup
steps.details: BESCOM meter reader installs smart meter and powers the connection.

documents.name: Ownership Proof / Possession Certificate / Allotment Letter
documents.note: Sale Deed, BBMP Khata, or Sanctioned Plan

services.title: Sanctioned Load Enhancement or Reduction
services.description: Increase load for new appliances (Air Conditioners, EV Chargers, Heavy Machinery) or reduce sanctioned load to avoid high monthly fixed charges.

steps.title: Submit Load Revision Request
steps.details: Apply online on Seva Sindhu with existing Account ID and requested load in kW.

steps.title: Pay Additional Security Deposit (for Load Increase)
steps.details: Pay incremental Initial Security Deposit (ISD) of ₹1,200/kW for extra capacity.

steps.title: Technical Feasibility Check
steps.details: BESCOM line inspector checks transformer capacity in your area.

steps.title: Load Update Approval
steps.details: Sanctioned load is updated in billing server.

documents.name: Test Report by Licensed Contractor (for load > 5 kW)

services.title: Faulty / Fast Meter Testing & Replacement
services.description: If your electricity bill suddenly doubled without increased usage, request official meter testing at BESCOM laboratory or replacement of damaged meter.

steps.title: Raise Meter Challenge Request
steps.details: Call 1912 or lodge request on BESCOM Mithra App / web portal.

steps.title: Check Meter Installation
steps.details: BESCOM technician installs a secondary reference check-meter alongside existing meter for 7 days.

steps.title: Lab Test Report & Bill Adjustment
steps.details: If meter is found fast (+/- 2% error), meter is replaced free of cost and excess billed amount is refunded in future bills.
